title: Grilled Eggplant Yaki
description: A Japanese-inspired grilled eggplant dish with intense flavors and aromas, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: Brush eggplant slices with sesame oil and season with tagine spice blend.
Grill eggplant slices for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and slightly charred.
In a small saucepan, combine soy sauce and mirin. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce sauce by half, stirring occasionally.
Serve grilled eggplant slices with reduced sauce and garnish with chopped scallions.
Optional: garnish with toasted sesame seeds and chopped fresh herbs.
